message:
feat(indexer): Wire up HNSW index building in semantic indexer

Complete the HNSW integration:

- indexer/semantic.rs: Build HNSW graph when --build-hnsw is set
- indexer/mod.rs: Pass build_hnsw flag through indexing pipeline
- search/ann_index.rs: Fix compilation issues, add search method
- lib.rs: Wire up approximate flag in search path
- tests/e2e_error_recovery.rs: Add test coverage
- benches/index_perf.rs: Add HNSW build benchmarks

Also syncs beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7034,6 +7034,7 @@ fn run_doctor(
                     db_path: db_path.clone(),
                     data_dir: data_dir.clone(),
                     semantic: false,
+                    build_hnsw: false,
                     embedder: "fastembed".to_string(),
                     progress: Some(progress.clone()),
                 };
@@ -8955,6 +8956,7 @@ fn spawn_background_indexer(
             db_path,
             data_dir,
             semantic: false,
+            build_hnsw: false,
             embedder: "fastembed".to_string(),
             progress,
         };
@@ -9106,6 +9108,7 @@ fn run_index_with_data(
         db_path: db_path.clone(),
         data_dir: data_dir.clone(),
         semantic,
+        build_hnsw,
         embedder: embedder.clone(),
         progress: Some(index_progress.clone()),
     };
